name: the shared primitive natively enforces the fullstack rule set on app code so a blocking violation exits one
command:
printf 'const x: any = 1;' > a.ts
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-write-time.sh" a.ts 2>e.txt; rc=$?
[ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -qE 'status=red rules_checked=[0-9]+ blocking=[1-9]' e.txt && echo fullstack-native-enforced 1>&2
